title: NotebookLM is now bigger than Gemini
summary: Jeff Su observes that NotebookLM now has more search interest than Google Gemini. He notes NotebookLM's core advantage is providing grounded answers from multi-format documents rather than hallucinations, recommending it for accuracy-critical tasks where sources are known and varied.
